title: Qwohog (disambiguation)
content:
'''Qwohog''' could refer to several things:

*[[Qwohog (species)|Qwohog]], a species from the planet [[Hirsi]]
*[[Qwohog (language)|Qwohog]], the native language of the Qwohog
*[[Qwohog sign language]], a language Qwohogs used to communicate with nonnatives

{{Disambig}}
